title: Where with OR across multiple joined tables
prompt: Write `MyApp.Search.find_by_any_field/1` that takes a string and returns Users matching on `u.name` OR `u.email` OR their team's `t.name`. Inner-join team, use `dynamic([u, t], ilike(u.name, ^pattern) or ilike(u.email, ^pattern) or ilike(t.name, ^pattern))` for the OR composition. Pin the pattern once. Write to `lib/my_app/search.ex`.
tier_rationale: OR across joined tables inside dynamic/2 is a fiddly pattern — binding list must include both.
